content:
Hi Chan — I’ve pulled the rental documents I can see for your portfolio.

**Rental documents found**
- **PROP-0001** — Lease_Agreement_2025.pdf  
  Document: DOC-0007 — [Open document](/data/users/demo-user/_storage/PROP-0001/lease-2025.pdf) — [Rental page](/property/PROP-0001/rental)
- **PROP-0006** — Lease_Agreement_2026.pdf  
  Document: DOC-0003 — [Open document](/data/users/demo-user/_storage/PROP-0006/lease-2026.pdf) — [Rental page](/property/PROP-0006/rental)

I don’t see other rental records in the data you’ve given me. If you need rent amounts, payment history, tenant contact details or upcoming renewals, that data isn’t included here — you can view those on each property’s Rental page (links above) or in [View Portfolio](/portfolio).

Would you like me to open a specific lease, show payment history for a property, or export these documents?
